summary: Iteration 212 - Five Elements Wheel & Botanical Trade Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Five Elements Wheel on Botany page works correctly with all 5 element nodes, filtering, and Garden Balance bar. Trade Circle shows Botanicals and Recipes category tabs with gravity mass badges on listings.
critical_code_review_comments: FiveElementsWheel.js - SVG wheel with 5 element nodes (Wood/Fire/Earth/Metal/Water), data-testid attributes present - PASS
Wheel node click filters plant list via elementFilter state in Botany.js - PASS
Clear button appears when element is selected (data-testid='wheel-clear-filter') - PASS
Wheel shows plant counts per element - PASS
Garden Balance bar shows when gardenSummary.total_plants > 0 and no element selected - PASS
Gravity formula breakdown shows when element is selected (Base: 60 + Element + Nature + Meridian + Rarity) - PASS
POST /api/trade-circle/botanical-listing creates listing with gravity_mass from TCM properties - PASS
POST /api/trade-circle/botanical-listing with listing_type=frequency_recipe creates recipe listing - PASS
GET /api/trade-circle/gravity-weighted returns listings sorted by gravity_mass with visual_scale and visual_depth - PASS
Trade Circle frontend shows Botanicals and Recipes category tabs - PASS
Listing cards show gravity mass badge (e.g., 'm78 741Hz') for botanical/recipe listings - PASS
seed_data_creation: Test listings created and cleaned up during backend tests. Existing test listings: Wild Chrysanthemum Seeds (m78), Shen Calming Recipe (m85)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 212 added two enhancements: (1) Five Elements Wheel - interactive SVG component on Botany page center column that filters plants by element. The wheel has data-testid='wheel-svg' and each node has data-testid='wheel-node-{element}' (lowercase). Clear button has data-testid='wheel-clear-filter'. Garden Balance bar shows element distribution when user has plants. (2) Phygital Marketplace - botanical and frequency_recipe categories added to Trade Circle. POST /api/trade-circle/botanical-listing computes gravity_mass from TCM element+nature weights (formula: 60 + element_weight + nature_weight). Element weights: Wood=10, Fire=15, Earth=12, Metal=8, Water=14. Nature weights: Hot=15, Warm=10, Neutral=5, Cool=10, Cold=15. GET /api/trade-circle/gravity-weighted returns listings sorted by mass with visual_scale (0.8-1.2) and visual_depth (0-1). Solfeggio frequencies: Wood=396Hz, Fire=528Hz, Earth=639Hz, Metal=741Hz, Water=852Hz.

five_elements_wheel.details: SVG wheel renders with 5 element nodes, click filters plants, clear button works, shows plant counts and gravity formula

wheel_element_nodes.details: All 5 element nodes found with correct data-testid attributes

wheel_filtering.details: Clicking element node filters plant list, clicking again or Clear button removes filter

garden_balance_bar.details: Shows element distribution when gardenSummary.total_plants > 0 and no element selected

botanical_listing_endpoint.details: Creates listing with gravity_mass computed from element+nature weights, frequency from element

frequency_recipe_listing.details: Creates frequency recipe listing with category='frequency_recipe'

gravity_weighted_endpoint.details: Returns listings sorted by gravity_mass descending with visual_scale, visual_depth, element_color

categories_endpoint.details: Includes botanical (leaf icon, #22C55E) and frequency_recipe (zap icon, #EAB308)

trade_circle_ui_categories.details: Botanicals and Recipes tabs visible in Trade Circle filter bar

gravity_mass_badge.details: Listing cards show gravity mass badge (e.g., 'm78 741Hz') for botanical/recipe listings
